calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Emley for and with Joann Fuller (Petitioner).

Mr. Emley stated that they do not have a marriage license, that he has offer of proof, that Ms. Fuller and the Sister can testify that a document was signed by the Parties, that a search was performed and that documents are no longer available. The Petition to Establish Fact fo Marriage was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
